title: VC Support
description: Growth diagnosis, workshops, and office hours for VC-backed founders who need practical help turning traction into a clearer growth system.
buyerProblem: Portfolio founders often need senior commercial judgment before they are ready to hire or brief a full agency.
usefulWhen: A founder needs a second opinion on their growth bottleneck
The portfolio needs practical AI-native GTM training
A startup needs a sharper growth plan before the next fundraise or hiring decision
growthSystem: Portfolio workshops on AI-native GTM and acquisition
Referral path into sprint or fractional CMO support where useful
proof: Mentoring and programme work across Google for Startups, GrowthMentor, and startup education communities
Founder-led operator support for teams between traction and scale
